name: christianromney-claude-plugins
description: Christian Romney's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: usage-insights
plugins.description: Generate time-aware, config-aware HTML usage insight reports from Claude Code session data with trend classification and config-awareness

plugins.name: journal
plugins.description: Publish journal entries to basic-memory (blog) or Slack (#christian-ai-journal)

plugins.name: generate
plugins.description: Skills for generating architectural briefings, commit messages, and technical diagrams

plugins.name: chezmoi
plugins.description: Reference guide and workflow for managing dotfiles with chezmoi

plugins.name: jujutsu
plugins.description: Reference guide for Jujutsu (jj) version control system

plugins.name: sync
plugins.description: Sync dotfiles, personal-notes, and work-notes repositories to GitHub

plugins.name: socratic-partner
plugins.description: Problem-solving thinking partner using the Socratic method
